name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_SourceMaterial_Species
title: R5: The species of an organism e.g. the Latin epithet of the species of the plant/animal (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.species` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.species` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.species` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.species` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.species` has a context of SubstanceSpecification.sourceMaterial based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.species` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The species of an organism e.g. the Latin epithet of the species of the plant/animal (new)
